explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.path_to_improvement: Document AI governance structure, including oversight of vendor AI tools.

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: The 2024 Corporate Responsibility Report mentions Campbell's Insights Engine, an AI system used for trend identification in product development. This report acknowledges the existence and function of this AI system.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

relevant_sources.summary: The 2024 Corporate Responsibility Report provides evidence for the **transparency** pillar by mentioning Campbell's Insights Engine's use of AI for trend identification in product development. While the report acknowledges the existence and function of this AI system, it lacks specific details regarding its operational execution or formal commitments.
relevant_sources.title: 2024 Corporate Responsibility Report

summary.overall_findings: Campbell's's public documentation was reviewed across 7 responsible AI pillars, and no qualifying evidence was identified. While the assessment reviewed 8 publicly available sources, no documented AI governance, oversight, or accountability practices were found.
